name: @bootoshi/ghostbox
description: Spawn isolated AI agents in Docker containers

scripts.build:mcp-server: bun build docker/ghostbox-mcp-server.ts --target=node --outfile=docker/ghostbox-mcp-server.js --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod && bun build docker/qmd-mcp-server.ts --target=node --outfile=docker/qmd-mcp-server.js --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli.ts --outdir=dist --target=node --external pino --external pino-pretty --external thread-stream --external sonic-boom --external dockerode --external ssh2 --external @grpc/grpc-js && bun build src/api.ts --outdir=dist --target=node --external pino --external pino-pretty --external thread-stream --external sonic-boom --external dockerode --external ssh2 --external @grpc/grpc-js && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/cli.js > dist/cli.tmp && mv dist/cli.tmp dist/cli.js && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.build:image: bun run build:ghost-server && bun run build:ghost-server-claude && bun run build:mcp-server && docker build -t ghostbox-agent docker/
scripts.build:native: bun run native:generate && xcodebuild -project native/Ghostbox.xcodeproj -scheme Ghostbox -configuration Release build
scripts.build: bun run build:ghost-server && bun run build:ghost-server-claude && bun run build:mcp-server && bun run build:cli
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build:ghost-server && bun run build:ghost-server-claude && bun run build:mcp-server && bun run build:cli
scripts.lint: bunx biome check src/ tests/ && bunx eslint src/
scripts.lint:fix: bunx biome check --write src/ tests/ && bunx eslint --fix src/
